feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Whispers From The Devil
entry.summary:
Author: j_marie_archie50

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,241Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Eddie flinched away and slammed his body into the door again. “C’mon, Buck! I saw her in the window! She’s in there! She’s scaring Emma, can’t you hear our daughter screaming in there?!” “Eddie, Eddie, stop!” Buck exclaimed, getting frustrated now. “Emma isn’t screaming, you’re going to–” “I can’t get it open!” Eddie cried. “Why won’t it open!? Buck, help me, please! Why aren’t you doing anything!?” Buck put himself between Eddie and the door. He held his hands up, setting them on Eddie’s chest. “Eddie, enough. There is nothing holding the door shut. There is nobody inside the nursery with Emma. She’s not screaming, she’s not crying, she’s asleep.”   OR: Buck and Eddie buy a house, one big enough for their family. Soon after moving in, Eddie begins to hear and see things that don't make sense. Buck doesn't believe him until it's too late.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Reflecting light
entry.summary:
Author: stargazingstormtrooper92

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,776Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: ‘’You’re fine. Theo’s fine,’’ Eddie starts softly. ‘’He’s with the strongest woman in the world who beat up Chimney and the Lees in mahjong at the age of six. Oh, and Athena is there.’’Eddie teases, mentioning Jee and Buck laughs lifting his head from Eddie’s neck and leaning it on his temple instead, swaying in the rhythm Eddie leads them.‘’She got that from her uncle,’’ Buck teases.‘’What, me?’’ Eddie says pinching Buck’s back. ‘’She did learn a couple of Spanish phrases from my telenovelas that I pray to God Maddie never looks up the meaning of.’’Buck snorts. ‘’I meant me, dumbass.’’Eddie kisses Buck’s temple and looks him in the eyes. ‘’I know. I just love seeing you all flustered when I call myself her uncle.’’***Or: Buck and Eddie dance on B shift colleague’s wedding. Inspired by Luke and Lorelai dancing on Liz’s wedding in Gilmore Girls. Soft, cute, fluffy 💕

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Something Changed
entry.summary:
Author: Taylorm1509

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,714Chapters: 2/13Kudos: 9

Summary: After a crisis changes everything, Buck ends up staying with Eddie and Christopher while he recovers and tries to figure out what life looks like afterwards. What starts as temporary becomes routine. Routines become habits. Habits become something neither of them really knows how to name. Buck learns that getting better doesn’t mean becoming who he was before. Eddie learns that taking care of someone and needing someone might not be the same thing. Meanwhile Christopher has plans, the 118 has opinions, therapy is deeply annoying, and two people who are absolutely convinced they’re just being normal continue making increasingly questionable friendship decisions.

entry.title: Dear Theo, I thought you could save me (no one can)
entry.summary:
Author: buddiecanon_2026

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,763Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 20

Summary: Six months after fostering Theo, Buck gets a knock at his door. The foster care system has finally found a suitable forever family for Theo. Buck knew this day would come. He knew it wasn't going to last. He knew he was never going to be truly suitable. So why did it hurt so much? Or: After Theo leaves Buck loses himself, and no one can stop it. Or can they?

entry.title: Amor Fati
entry.summary:
Author: whataboutthepretenders

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,659Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: "It's not that we don't want to take her because of what happened at her last placement, it's just… you keep hesitating? What are you not saying? You keep... skirting around something." Diedra pauses, and shoves the first thought that appears far out of her mind. It would definitely be unprofessional, and tone-deaf. /She killed her mom./ "She has a cat." Or, Maddie and Chim take in an emergency foster placement, which quickly leads to Buck and Eddie becoming girl dads. - - - - FYI: Buckley-Diaz family centered so if you came here for Madney just know they're the side dish but Buddie is the main meal

entry.title: My bloody steps leave a trail (I beg you to follow)
entry.summary:
Author: That_humanpersonthing

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,845Chapters: 24/25Kudos: 436

Summary: What if Eddie wasn't ok after Chris left. What if his days started with a practiced smile, and scratches on his thighs so he could feel something other then the numbness. To make him feel something, after being left with nothing when his son walked out the door. What if Eddie saw no hope in getting what he wanted back, he made a plan. Or what if Eddie gives himself two weeks to ensure everything will be ok, and then he'll be gone.

entry.summary:
Author: Star_green

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,267Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: You never imagined you’d live to see Evan Buckley jealous. And much less that the person sparking that jealousy wouldn’t be another man, or a situation related to his job, but a puppy barely a few months old that had just entered their lives....... A dog

entry.title: ALL THAT GLITTERS.
entry.summary:
Author: deadgraysclub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,559Chapters: 1/18Kudos: 4

Summary: Eddie Diaz doesn't fall in love. He doesn't do boyfriends, doesn't do mornings, doesn't do the version of himself that wants things he can't file away before sunrise. He does Babylon. He does coke off bathroom mirrors and men whose names don't matter and a life so airtight nothing gets in. Buck walks into Babylon on a Friday night with a flyer from his refrigerator and no idea what he's walking into. He's newly out, a little broke, sleeping on his sister's couch, and constitutionally incapable of wanting things quietly. Eddie looks at him from across the bar and thinks: there it is. He means to ruin him. He does not mean to keep him.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.summary:

entry.title: all the trouble that we made
entry.summary:
Author: eddiekinie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,727Chapters: 5/9Kudos: 18

Summary: But that’s not true at all— the idea that Eddie would only recognize Buck by that birthmark. He closes his eyes and brings his fingers to Buck’s face, touching him carefully, feeling out the shape of him. The lines around his eyes, the size of his nose. His strong jaw under the calluses of his fingers, the faint acne scars along his jaw and cheeks. And finally, his dry, split lips, full and soft. Eddie could recognize him even with his eyes closed. ══════════════ Eddie Díaz is, by no means, a man of honor or justice. He only stayed in the job because a series of desperate choices dragged him there; he did it for his son, because Christopher needed him. And he did it because it was the only way to follow the trail of the man he lost years ago. When Lewis Garber, a member of the Colombo mafia, turns up dead under mysterious circumstances and with a string of messages threatening to execute every last Colombo, Eddie can only think of one person. Suddenly, knowing Buck was alive is no longer enough when everyone seems determined to take that life away from him. Eddie wants the person responsible in his hands.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Together, We Rise
entry.summary:
Author: ILoveMacGyver21

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,452Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Bobby Nash has been dead for over a year, now. It's been hell on earth, but the 118 was able to begin moving forward, slowly but surely - together. They had a system and it was working. Until the puzzle started falling apart. When Athena Grant-Nash gets a phone call one afternoon that changes everything and opens a door to the possibility of Bobby actually being alive, Buck is sent into a spiral trying to be there for her while not wanting to get his hopes up and be brutally vulnerable once again. Balancing parenting, his complicated feelings for one Eddie Diaz, and the fact that he wants nothing more than to just have his dad back, Buck is left terrified and weary of what he and Athena will find in Phoenix. Because no matter what she says, no matter how she tries to reassure him - as they grow closer to the truth, Buck is certain of one thing. Once again, their lives are going to change. He just isn't sure if he can survive it this time.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley & Bobby Nash
  • Athena Grant/Bobby Nash
  • Firehouse 118 Crew & Bobby Nash
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: the good boy
entry.summary:
Author: tiredwrites

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,615Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 135

Summary: “Fuck,” Eddie groans, head falling back against his chair as Buck continues to suck him off and swallow around his hard shaft, drool collecting at the base and making his skin sticky with it. “Such a good boy, huh? Helping me relax,” Eddie coos, cupping the curve of Buck’s skull and petting in long, soft glides. Buck whines and trembles in place again, a single tear slithering down ruddy cheeks. “My good boy. Couldn’t have asked for a better puppy.” Buck moans sweetly, the vibrations making Eddie hiss and throb inside Buck’s mouth.- or; puppy!hybrid buck sucks mafia eddie off while eddie answers phone calls

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: When the hand falls
entry.summary:
Author: LovemeanywayBandE

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,629Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 103

Summary: Eddie's hand was on him, finger pointing at his face. Bobby's hands in the air. Two people. Too close. Too loud. Hands everywhere.Buck's vision tunnelled to a pinpoint. His body registered threats from multiple directions—Eddie in front, Bobby beside him, both of them with their hands raised, both of them angry, both of them *too close*.The room tilted. Sound became muffled, distant. His father's voice overlapped with Bobby's. Connor's hands overlapped with Eddie's. Past and present collapsed into each other until Buck couldn't tell which was real.*Hands coming up. Voices raised. Nowhere to run. Surrounded. Trapped. It's happening again. It's always happening again.*But Buck's brain didn't see Eddie and Bobby.Buck's brain saw violence coming from everywhere.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: is it over now?
entry.summary:
Author: aftermathbaby

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,876Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 146

Summary: On the way back from a call, Buck is abducted and brutally assaulted. The aftermath is messy: Buck insists he’s fine (he's not), Eddie is wracked with guilt (predictably), and Christopher knows way too much (as usual). As the 118 rallies around them, everyone has to grapple with the fallout of the violence and what it means for Buck, for Buck and Eddie, and for themselves.

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 329,593Chapters: 68/?Kudos: 132

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: Ice bound
entry.summary:
Author: LovemeanywayBandE

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,978Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 76

Summary: The first time Eddie saw himself on a sports blog, it wasn't about his stats. The headline read: *"Teen Hockey Phenoms: The Diaz-Buckley Dynamic That's Breaking the Internet."* Below it was a gif of Buck slamming into the boards to defend Eddie from a brutal check, followed immediately by Eddie retaliating with a hit so fierce the other player went down hard. The caption: *"Tell me these two aren't completely feral for each other."* "Have you seen this?" Buck asked, appearing at Eddie's shoulder in the common room, phone already out. The comments were... a lot. *"The way Diaz looks at Buckley though 👀"* *"I'm not saying they're in love but I'm also not NOT saying it"* *"These two have more chemistry than my parents' entire marriage"* Buck was laughing, but Eddie noticed the way his ears had gone pink. "People are wild, man." "Yeah," Eddie said, throat dry. "Wild."
